title: Hall of the Wind Crystals
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hall of the Wind Crystals''' was the entrance to the [[Royal Residence]] in the [[Fountain Palace]] on [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]]. A [[wind-crystal]] chandelier the size of an [[A-wing]] hung from the ceiling. During a skirmish in the Palace, one in which [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] attempted to kill [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]], [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] brought down the light fixture on a group of guards.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
